context.target_audience: Individuals, couples, families in French-speaking Switzerland
context.emotional_tone: Soothing, professional, confidential, respectful, grounded, safe
key_requirements: Neutral and sober tones (Beige, Grey, White)

hero.description: Peaceful, breathable hero section. Either a split layout with text on left and soothing image on right, or centered text with a subtle textured background.

services.description: Clean cards describing the 3 main service areas. Use generous padding and subtle hover lift.

approach.description: Text describing the systemic approach on one side, calming abstract or nature image on the other.

contact.description: Clean, easy-to-read form. No distractions. Clear validation messages.

logo_placeholder.instruction: Create a custom SVG component 'LogoPlaceholder'. Use the accent color (#CD5D45). Draw a simple circle with abstract lines inside representing a stylized family and hands. Do NOT use an external image for the logo.

hero.title: Sophie Aigroz, Psychologue FSP
hero.subtitle: Un espace d'écoute confidentiel et respectueux au cœur du Valais.

items.title: Thérapies Relationnelles
items.desc: Accompagnement pour les familles, les couples et la coparentalité. Retrouver l'équilibre et la communication.

items.title: Soutien à la Parentalité
items.desc: Guidance parentale, prévention du burn-out et renforcement du lien parent-enfant.

items.title: Suivis Individuels
items.desc: Pour adultes et adolescents. Gestion des difficultés émotionnelles et régulation.

approach.title: Une Approche Systémique
approach.text: Je propose un accompagnement basé sur l'approche systémique, considérant l'individu dans son environnement relationnel. Mon cabinet à Saxon offre un cadre sécurisant pour explorer vos difficultés et mobiliser vos ressources.

instructions_to_main_agent: Use 'Playfair Display' for all Headings (H1-H3). Import it from Google Fonts.
Use 'Mulish' for all Body text. Import it from Google Fonts.
Implement smooth scrolling (Lenis is recommended but native 'scroll-behavior: smooth' in CSS is acceptable for simplicity if Lenis is complex to setup).
Use Shadcn UI components for the Contact Form (Input, Textarea, Select, Button, Form, Label).
Customize Shadcn components to match the Earthy theme (remove default black/zinc borders, use soft grey borders).
Ensure the contact form has the specific fields: Nom, Email, Téléphone, Pour qui (Self, Couple, Family, Child), Description, Motif.
Do NOT use gradients. Use solid colors and subtle textures.
Ensure high contrast for accessibility (WCAG AA).

universal_guidelines.animations: Use framer-motion for entrance animations (fade-in up). Hover states should be subtle (opacity change or slight scale).
universal_guidelines.accessibility: Ensure all text has sufficient contrast against the beige backgrounds. Use semantic HTML.
universal_guidelines.responsive: Stack columns on mobile. Ensure touch targets are at least 44px.
